description_long: This is a cubic parcel box with a clean, modern design, featuring the text 'UNIVERSITY OF XR WESTMINSTER' prominently on one face. The box is decorated with three colored squares labeled 'VR', 'AR', and 'MR', each in a different pastel shade (magenta, teal, and yellow, respectively) along the right side. The surface appears to be made of sturdy cardboard or lightweight composite material, suitable for shipping or promotional use. The typography is bold and clear, with a focus on the 'XR' acronym, suggesting a connection to extended reality technologies. The box is likely hollow, designed to contain documents, merchandise, or promotional materials. Its overall appearance is professional and visually striking, making it suitable for use in academic or tech-related urban environments.
description: A cubic parcel box with 'UNIVERSITY OF XR WESTMINSTER' branding and colored VR, AR, MR labels, made of sturdy material and designed for shipping or promotional use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full 'UNIVERSITY OF XR WESTMINSTER' text and the colored VR, AR, MR labels on the right.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the same text and colored labels visible, but the left edge of the box is more prominent.
description_view_2: View showing the top and right faces, with the text partially visible and the colored labels still clear.
description_view_3: View focusing on the right side, with the colored VR, AR, MR labels most prominent and the text partially visible.
